ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2012 Continued To Apr-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Luigi Gaglione. Justin Goodwin for and with Colombina Gaglione-Mansolf.

Counsel agreed to a three week continuance. The Accounting Petition and the Petition for Instructions was continued to April 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Goodwin is to file the amended accounting by that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Continued To Mar-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Continued To Feb-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Goodwin for and with Colombina Gaglione-Mansolf and for Rafael Gaglione. Michael Freeman for and with Luigi Gaglione.

Mr. Goodwin stated that the Santa Rosa property was sold and the proceeds were in the Trust account, that the San Francisco property was appraised and that he wanted to have it inspected. The Parties agreed to a 30-day continuance for Mr. Goodwin to address the issues raised in the Examiner's notes and to file a new accounting. The Accounting Petition and the Petition for Instructions were continued to February 21, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Instructions: (1)To Compel Trustee To Account; (2) Objection To Account And Report Of Trustees, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Continued To Feb-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Continued To Jan-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions: (1)To Compel Trustee To Account; (2) Objection To Account And Report Of Trustees, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Continued To Jan-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2011 Continued To Dec-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Goodwin for and with Rafael Gaglione and Colombina Gaglione-Mansolf. Michael Freedman for and with Luigi Gaglione.

The Accounting Petition and the Petition for Instructions were continued to December 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for handling of the remaining issues with regard to the properties.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

Petition For Instructions: (1)To Compel Trustee To Account; (2) Objection To Account And Report Of Trustees, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge
Off Calendar Oct-18-2011 Continued To Dec-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions: (1)To Compel Trustee To Account; (2) Objection To Account And Report Of Trustees, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge
Off Calendar Sep-07-2011 Continued To Oct-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Goodwin for Colombina Gaglione-Mansolf and Rafael Gaglione. Micheal Freedman for Luigi Gaglione.

Counsel agreed to a continuance and decided on an Appraiser. The matter was continued to October 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Petition For Instructions: (1)To Compel Trustee To Account; (2) Objection To Account And Report Of Trustees, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Continued To Sep-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Goodwin for and with Colombina Gaglione Mansolf and Rafaele Gaglione. Michael Freedman for and with Luigi Gaglione.

The accounting was filed this morning with a hearing date of October 18, 2011. The issues of agreeing on an Appraiser for the San Francisco property, sale/buyout of the Santa Rosa property and distribution have not been resolved. The Petition for Instructions was continued to September 7, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the Appraiser. The appraisal should be completed by October 18, 2011.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Petition For Instructions: (1)To Compel Trustee To Account; (2) Objection To Account And Report Of Trustees, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Continued To Aug-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Goowdin specially appearing for Paula Canny for Respondents Raffaele Gaglione and Colombina Gaglione-Mansolf (Respondents). Michael Freedman for Luigi Gaglione.

Mr. Goodwin stated that there was an issue of missing materials from the Former Attorney, that Counsel John Boessenecker and Counsel Paula Canny were medically unavailable, that he filed an opposition to the petition this morning, that he provided a copy to Mr. Freedman and requested a continuance. Mr. Freedman objected to another continuance and requested an order to account. The Parties held discussions regarding sale of the Maynard Street property and the Santa Rosa property, obtaining appraisals, the accounting, delay, valuation issues and the issue of an evidentiary hearing. The Court stated that there needs to be formal appraisal on the San Francisco property and that Counsel need to agree on a neutral Appraiser, and that they need to agree on a neutral Broker to sell the Santa Rosa property. The Court encouraged the Parties to cooperate and work on how to distribute the Trust quickly and equitably. The accounting needs to be filed by August 30, 2011. The petition for instructions was continued to August 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the accounting, status of agreement on a Realtor to sell the Santa Rosa property and status of agreement of a neutral appraiser for the San Francisco property.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Instructions: (1)To Compel Trustee To Account; (2) Objection To Account And Report Of Trustees, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge
Off Calendar May-04-2011 Continued To Jul-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
